mapper.sql: id, asset_id, repair_code, repair_date, finish_date, repair_type, repair_reason, repair_content, repair_bus, repair_person, repair_fee, repair_status, remark, cdate, udate, asset_code, asset_name, asset_type, asset_type_id, manufacturer, spe_model, dep_id, user_id
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from asset_repair
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into asset_repair (id, asset_id, repair_code, repair_date, finish_date, repair_type, repair_reason, repair_content, repair_bus, repair_person, repair_fee, repair_status, remark, cdate, udate, asset_code, asset_name, asset_type, asset_type_id, manufacturer, spe_model, dep_id, user_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into asset_repair
id,
asset_id,
repair_code,
repair_date,
finish_date,
repair_type,
repair_reason,
repair_content,
repair_bus,

remark,
cdate,
udate,
asset_code,
asset_name,
asset_type,
asset_type_id,
manufacturer,
spe_model,
dep_id,
user_id,

mapper.update:
update asset_repair
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_id = #{record.assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
repair_code = #{record.repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_date = #{record.repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish_date = #{record.finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
repair_type = #{record.repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
repair_reason = #{record.repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_content = #{record.repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_bus = #{record.repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_person = #{record.repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_fee = #{record.repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_status = #{record.repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
asset_code = #{record.assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_name = #{record.assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_type = #{record.assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_type_id = #{record.assetTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manufacturer = #{record.manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spe_model = #{record.speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_id = #{record.depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update asset_repair set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_id = #{record.assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, repair_code = #{record.repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_date = #{record.repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish_date = #{record.finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, repair_type = #{record.repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, repair_reason = #{record.repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_content = #{record.repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_bus = #{record.repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_person = #{record.repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_fee = #{record.repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_status = #{record.repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, asset_code = #{record.assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_name = #{record.assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_type = #{record.assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_type_id = #{record.assetTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, manufacturer = #{record.manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spe_model = #{record.speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dep_id = #{record.depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update asset_repair
asset_id = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
repair_code = #{repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_date = #{repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish_date = #{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
repair_type = #{repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
repair_reason = #{repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_content = #{repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_bus = #{repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_person = #{repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_fee = #{repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_status = #{repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
asset_code = #{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_name = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_type = #{assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_type_id = #{assetTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spe_model = #{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
